name: SignWell — Send for Signature
description: Triggered by the dashboard Send for Signature form. Fetches merchant and contact data from Airtable, builds a pre-filled SignWell document from the selected template, sends it to the contact for e-signature, and creates a tracking record in the Document Sends table. Banking/payment data passes through only — never stored.

value.Document Name: ={{ $('Get Company from Airtable').item.json.fields['DBA Name'] || $('Get Company from Airtable').item.json.fields['Legal Name'] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, document_id: $('Send to SignWell').item.json.id }) }}
